chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1200 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 6825/23 3.For hearing of CMA 6826/23 4.For hearing of main case 01-02-2024 Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for intervenor. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Asif Raza Soomro, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Gambat. ***** Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Gambat is present and submits that Civil Appeal No.194 of 2018 is pending before 2nd Additional District Judge, Khairpur over the same property. In view of above, this petition being misconceived is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
